subject: FW: Jeffrey E.
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Patricia Neville [mailto:sskkyy17@gmail.com] 
Sent: Monday, January 21, 2008 1:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Jeffrey E.


Jeffrey,
 
Just returned from the cruise. Remind me never to board a vessel with
3,000 people  again :-)
Wanted to thank you for offering to share a good NY Dr. Received
results, and all 6 biopsies were neg. Great news.
Back in NY and hope to be busy working through Wilhelmina Agency. Cross
your fingers for me!
Fill me in on how you are when you can.
Patricia

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: Patricia Neville [mailto:sskkyy17@gmail.com]
Sent: Monday, January 21, 2008 1:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Jeffrey E.

Jeffrey,
 
Just returned from the cruise. Remind me never to board a vessel with 3,000 people  again :-)
Wanted to thank you for offering to share a good NY Dr. Received results, and all 6 biopsies were neg. Great news.
Back in NY and hope to be busy working through Wilhelmina Agency. Cross your fingers for me!
Fill me in on how you are when you can.
Patricia
